title: Amtech I9070 T-Handle Hex Key Set, Clear, 10-Piece
features: High impact plastic handles with chrome vanadium steel shafts
Unlike conventional t-handles, these wrenches feature two drive ends
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Box Contains 6x Wrenches (2, 2, 5, 3, 4, 5 and 6mm)
